title: Tronglaobi Bomb Attack Case To Be Handed Over To NIA: Manipur CM Yumnam Khemchand Singh
description: Addressing a press conference at his official bungalow, Manipur Chief Minister Yumnam Khemchand Singh condemned the incident in the strongest terms. He said the act appears to be the handiwork of individuals or groups with vested interests in disturbing the prevailing peace in the State.
